abstract.text: A time series containing values indexed by periods.

inlineContent.text: associates numeric values with time periods, enabling temporal
data analysis. The generic type parameter
Periods are always stored in chronologically sorted order, regardless of the
order in which they are provided during initialization.

code: let ts = TimeSeries(periods: periods, values: values)
let ts3 = TimeSeries(periods: periods, values: values, metadata: metadata)
